subject: textcat/textcat_multilabel training input values
new: error is raised when values other than 0.0 or 1.0 are given
truth: Training a textcat or textcat_multilabel model now raises an error if input values are not exactly 0.0 or 1.0.
quote: An error is now raised when unsupported values are given as input to train a `textcat` or `textcat_multilabel` model - ensure that values are 0.0 or 1.0 as explained in the [docs](https://spacy.io/api/textcategorizer#ass

from_fact: error is raised when values other than 0.0 or 1.0 are given

subject: KnowledgeBase
new: KnowledgeBase is now abstract; use InMemoryLookupKB instead
truth: Stop instantiating KnowledgeBase directly; use InMemoryLookupKB() instead, or if you subclass KnowledgeBase you must implement its abstract methods.
quote: If you've written a custom KB that inherits from [`KnowledgeBase`](https://spacy.io/api/kb), you'll need to implement its abstract methods, or alternatively inherit from `InMemoryLookupKB` instead.

from_fact: knowledgebase is now abstract; use inmemorylookupkb instead

subject: Russian and Ukrainian lemmatizers
truth: Stop relying on the old lemmatizer for Russian/Ukrainian; the lemmatizer has been switched to pymorphy3, which may produce different lemma outputs.
quote: Switch Russian and Ukrainian lemmatizers to pymorphy3 (#11345, #11811).

subject: textcat/textcat_multilabel default scorer
old: cat_p/r/f scores reflected all components' labels
new: cat_p/r/f scores now only reflect the final component's labels and performance
truth: Stop assuming cat_p/r/f scores aggregate across all textcat components; they now only reflect the final component's labels and performance unless custom scorers are used.
quote: Update the default scorer for textcat and textcat_multilabel to fix a bug related to threshold for textcat and to make it possible to score multiple textcat/textcat_multilabel components in a single pipeline with custom scorers. If no custom scorers are used, the cat_p/r/f scores will now only reflect the final component's labels and performance

from_fact: cat_p/r/f scores reflected all components' labels
cat_p/r/f scores now only reflect the final component's labels and performance

subject: token_acc score
old: token_acc was incorrectly inflated in v3.0-v3.4
new: token_acc now reports correct measure: # correct tokens / # predicted tokens
truth: Stop comparing token_acc scores against v3.0-v3.4 values; the metric was fixed and scores will be lower for the same performance.
quote: Correct the token_acc score to report the intended measure (# correct tokens / # predicted tokens, the same as in spaCy v2). The token_acc scores for v3.5 will be lower for the same performance because they were incorrectly inflated in v3.0-v3.4.

from_fact: token_acc was incorrectly inflated in v3.0-v3.4
token_acc now reports correct measure: # correct tokens / # predicted tokens

subject: transformer pipeline alignments
new: uses exact alignment from tokenizers for fast tokenizers
truth: Stop relying on the old heuristic alignments between spaCy tokens and transformer tokens; they may be slightly different now for all trained pipelines except ja_core_news_trf.
quote: The transformer pipelines require spacy-transformers v1.2, which uses the exact alignment from tokenizers for fast tokenizers instead of the heuristic alignment from spacy-alignments. For all trained pipelines except ja_core_news_trf, the alignments between spaCy tokens and transformer tokens may be slightly different.

from_fact: uses exact alignment from tokenizers for fast tokenizers
